CreateCredentialProvider.name: Credential provider name, 1–64 characters, only letters, digits, underscores, and hyphens allowed (^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$)
CreateCredentialProvider.credential: Credential content (varies by type: API_KEY includes apiKey; OAUTH2 includes provider/configType/clientId/clientSecret etc.; STS includes roleArn/externalId/durationSeconds)
